title: Accountant | AMK | Up to $5,200
description:
Duration: 4 months

Location: Ang Mo Kio
Working Hours: Monday - Friday 8.30am to 5.30pm

Responsibilities: 

  • Prepare monthly management reports using Tagetik
  • Prepare and reconcile general ledger schedules on a monthly basis
  • Compute and report tax using the OneSource system
  • Maintain Right-of-Use (ROU) assets schedules
  • Update and reconcile lease agreements in the Lease Accelerator system
  • Liaise with external auditors, tax agents, and relevant government authorities
  • Support financial planning and management reporting for business reviews
  • Monitor and analyse accounting data to produce accurate financial statements
  • Maintain proper documentation and ensure compliance with internal policies and local statutory requirements

Requirements:

  • Degree in Accountancy, Finance, or equivalent professional qualification (e.g. ACCA, CPA)
  • Minimum 3 years of relevant accounting experience, preferably in Singapore
  • Prior internal or external audit experience is an advantage
  • Hands-on experience with accounting systems (e.g. SAP)
  • Advanced Microsoft Excel skills (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, charts, basic financial models)

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to PERSOL Singapore Pte Ltd and its affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy available at https://www.persolsingapore.com/policies.
You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.
